calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Andrew Burgos is present.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Mark Taylor is present.
Attorney,Charles J.S. Woodson, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 71 Pearl Street, San Francisco, California.

The case is settled. The trial date of AUG-10-2009 is vacated.
